rationale: Review 1 catches real, diff-grounded naming problems — notably the primed, True-valued one-token projection lemma `unipotentRadical_trivial'` and the placeholder field whose name overstates content, plus the plausible `Is`-prefix convention for property-classes — whereas Review 2's blanket approve misses all of them; acting on Review 1 yields the better PR. The `AlgPoints` roadmap-conflict claim was not verifiable from the diff alone, but the other findings were.
